title: Infosys Singapore Approves Incorporation of Wholly Owned Subsidiary in Vietnam
detailed_summary: The Board of Infosys Singapore Pte Ltd, a wholly owned subsidiary of Infosys Limited, approved the incorporation of a wholly owned subsidiary in Vietnam under the proposed name "Infosys Vietnam LLC" or another name available in the corporate registry. The document does not disclose financial investment size, business scope, timeline, or expected impact; additional Regulation 30 information is to be disclosed in due course.

key_facts.fact: The Board of Infosys Singapore Pte Ltd approved the incorporation of a wholly owned subsidiary in Vietnam.
The proposed subsidiary name is "Infosys Vietnam LLC" or another name available in the corporate registry.
Infosys Singapore Pte Ltd is a wholly owned subsidiary of Infosys Limited.
Additional information required under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 will be disclosed in due course.

corporate_actions.description: Infosys Singapore Pte Ltd approved the incorporation of a wholly owned subsidiary in Vietnam in the name and style of "Infosys Vietnam LLC" or another name available in the corporate registry.

important_text_spans.text: Board of Infosys Singapore Pte Ltd, a wholly owned subsidiary of Infosys Limited has approved to incorporate a wholly owned subsidiary in the name and style of "Infosys Vietnam LLC'.
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the main disclosure that Infosys is creating a wholly owned subsidiary in Vietnam through Infosys Singapore.

important_text_spans.text: Additional information as required under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 will be disclosed in due course.
important_text_spans.reason: Shows that financial, operational, or other required details were not yet disclosed in this document.

processing_notes: The document announces only approval to incorporate a Vietnam subsidiary; it does not disclose investment amount, business scope, effective date, ownership percentage beyond wholly owned status, or expected financial impact.
